--- Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 59/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):3+1=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+1=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 3/5 targets affected.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Lizardfolk — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
